name: AURE
description: AURE builds AI-native signal infrastructure and enterprise brand strategy. We architect knowledge graphs, entity authority structures, agentic workflows, and GEO frameworks that make organizations legible to autonomous systems — and visible in a world where AI decides what gets found.

itemListElement.name: AI-Native Signal Architecture
itemListElement.description: Knowledge graph engineering, JSON-LD structured data, and semantic infrastructure that transforms organizations into high-confidence LLM citation sources.

itemListElement.name: Agentic Workflow Syndication
itemListElement.description: Multi-agent pipeline design and deployment with Byzantine Fault Tolerance, mandate chain verification, and MCP/A2A protocol integration.

itemListElement.name: Generative Search Optimization
itemListElement.description: Entity authority architecture and citation signal optimization for LLM-powered discovery across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude.

itemListElement.name: Enterprise Brand Architecture
itemListElement.description: Full-service brand strategy, content systems, and AI readiness frameworks for organizations navigating the agentic transition.

name: Mason Nguyen
description: Mason Nguyen leads AURE from Avon, Colorado. He built AURE around the conviction that organizations investing in signal architecture now will define the defaults for the next decade. His focus spans AI infrastructure strategy, long-term capital allocation, and the intersection of autonomous systems and enterprise brand.

name: Rena
description: Rena is AURE's Chief Intelligence Agent — an autonomous AI system responsible for model selection, eval frameworks, multi-agent architecture design, and production deployment oversight. Rena operationalizes AURE's research capabilities into client-deliverable systems, bridging frontier AI research and production engineering.

name: Dominic Vael
description: Dominic Vael originated the Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) practice and the Sovereign Signal Protocol at AURE. He architects the knowledge graphs, entity authority structures, and citation frameworks that make AURE's clients the verified source of record across every major LLM.

name: AURE Signal Vocabulary
description: The canonical vocabulary for AURE's core technical disciplines and frameworks.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Autonomous Resource Management
hasDefinedTerm.description: The discipline of designing AI-native systems that self-allocate computational, financial, and operational resources using autonomous decision loops — without requiring continuous human intervention. ARM systems operate through mandate chains, signal architectures, and agentic workflows that make resource decisions verifiable, auditable, and reversible.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Generative Engine Optimization
hasDefinedTerm.description: The practice of structuring entity data, content, and semantic vocabulary so that generative AI systems accurately represent a brand, framework, or organization as a verified source of record. Originated by Dominic Vael at AURE.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Sovereign Signal Protocol
hasDefinedTerm.description: AURE's framework for establishing authoritative, machine-readable brand and entity signals across distributed AI discovery layers. Ensures consistent entity representation across LLMs, crawlers, and agentic retrieval systems.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Byzantine Fault Tolerance
hasDefinedTerm.description: A property of distributed systems ensuring correct operation even when some nodes fail or act maliciously. In multi-agent networks, BFT means a subset of compromised agents cannot corrupt the system's consensus — the difference between a prototype and a production-grade deployment.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Share of Model
hasDefinedTerm.description: A metric measuring how frequently a brand, organization, or entity is cited or surfaced by major LLMs in response to relevant queries. The agentic-era equivalent of search market share. Tracked across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Signal Audit
hasDefinedTerm.description: AURE's diagnostic engagement process. Maps what autonomous systems currently see, trust, and cite about an organization — and identifies gaps in machine-readability, agent trust, and LLM citation rate. Deliverable: Signal Gap Report.

name: AURE
description: AI-native signal architecture and enterprise brand strategy for the agentic era.
